title: eriogonum angulosum subsp. gracillimum
intro: Eriogonum angulosum subsp. gracillimum, also known as a type of buckwheat sagebrush, is a plant species belonging to the Polygonaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum angulosum subsp. gracillimum include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also sometimes used in topical applications for its potential skin-soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.
